criteria.description: insertUserSchema in shared/schema.ts transforms username to lowercase
criteria.how_to_verify: Read shared/schema.ts and check for .transform(val => val.toLowerCase()) on the username field
criteria.evidence: shared/schema.ts line 73: username: z.string().min(1, "Username is required").transform(val => val.toLowerCase())

criteria.description: POST /api/projects/:id/share route normalizes username to lowercase
criteria.how_to_verify: Read server/routes.ts and verify that username from req.body is lowercased before storage lookup

criteria.description: DatabaseStorage has normalizeUsernames method that merges users
criteria.how_to_verify: Read server/databaseStorage.ts and verify the logic for updating project ownerId and shares during user merge
criteria.evidence: server/databaseStorage.ts lines 23-67: normalizeUsernames() iterates all users and merges projects, shares, and files when a case-variant collision is found.

criteria.description: FileStorage has normalizeUsernames method that merges users
criteria.how_to_verify: Read server/fileStorage.ts and verify the logic for updating project ownerId and sharedWith array during user merge
criteria.evidence: server/fileStorage.ts lines 66-104: normalizeUsernames() implemented with logic to merge projects and sharedWith arrays between colliding user accounts.

criteria.description: Server startup routine includes username normalization
criteria.how_to_verify: Read server/index.ts and verify that storage.normalizeUsernames() is called in the startup block
criteria.evidence: server/index.ts line 91: await storage.normalizeUsernames(); is called in the startup IIFE.

criteria.how_to_verify: Read client/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx and check Input components for autoCapitalize prop
criteria.evidence: client/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx lines 79 (login) and 107 (register): Input components for username include autoCapitalize="none".

criteria.how_to_verify: Read client/src/components/editor/ShareProjectDialog.tsx and check the Input component for autoCapitalize prop

criteria.description: All existing tests and type checks pass
criteria.evidence: Ran 'npm run check' which executed 'tsc' and completed without any type errors.
